name: Urban Infrastructure Integration
consequences: Immediate: Incorporates real-world city layouts into game design → Systemic: Increases development costs by 15% due to detailed architectural modeling → Strategic: Enhances player immersion but strains budget allocation for other systems. Controls authenticity vs. fiscal responsibility. Weakness: The options fail to consider cultural sensitivity in urban representation.
options: Adopt pre-existing blueprints of Los Angeles, Detroit, and Miami for base structures

Deploy AI-driven city evolution to generate dynamic, location-specific environments in real time
review: Controls authenticity vs. fiscal responsibility. Weakness: The options fail to consider cultural sensitivity in urban representation.
